name: Pete Aguilar
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $3,095,438 for Pete Aguilar in U.S. House, CA-33. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $3,095,438.
Public statements and congressional record context were reviewed for stance updates.
